title: SmiteCreate
description: A Forge modpack full of Creating
body:
## Why is this modpack on modrinth?

The SmiteCreate modpack was for a server, SmiteCreate but it got shut down,

## What is this modpack about?

SmiteCreate is a Forge (orig. Fabric) modpack

 ### Things you can do (or CREATE):
**1.** Create automatic farms

**2.** You can fly with planes

**3.** Admire new mobs

**4.** Fly to space

**5.** Play custom melodies

**6.** Get ores easily

**7.** Enjoy the modpack
